subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance and cleavest unto the cord of grace! Verily, the Most Great Ocean hath willed to manifest itself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه و المتمسک بحبل الفضل ان البحر الاعظم اراد ان یظهر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
